SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. - PLAINTIFF JAYSON HILL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. VICTORIA LARSON, COUNSEL WITH LAWYERS COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHT OF SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA IS PRESENT FOR THE SOLE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING PLAINTIFF ACCESS TO ZOOM APPEARANCES. NO LEGAL ASSISTANCE IF PROVIDED BY VICTORIA LARSON ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE FOLLOWING RELATED CASES ARE HEARD SIMULTANEOUSLY WITH THIS MATTER: CSM-21-864062 - EDWARD RICHARDSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS; CSM-21-864075 - AARON JUSTIN VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS; CSM-21-864076 - THOMAS BLUE VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS. JAYSON HILL TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFFS PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PLAINTIFFS IN THE RELATED CASES. WITNESS LARRY STRINGER, INTERIM MANAGER FOR HEALTHY STREETS OPERATIONS CENTER/ (RETRIED) DEPUTY DIRECTOR OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. WITNESS DEBRA MESKAN, ENCAMPMENT RESOLUTION TEAM LEAD, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. COURT RELIES ON THE SAME EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY AS PROVIDED IN THE RELATED CASE OF CSM-21-864062. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
